item.title: When your memory is this bad
item.description: Your secrets are safe with me... because I’ll probably forget them anyway. A very relatable memory struggle.

media:content.media:title: When your memory is this bad
media:content.media:description: Your secrets are safe with me... because I’ll probably forget them anyway. A very relatable memory struggle.

item.title: When a text tone changes
item.description: It’s the slight change in tone for me. Now I’m spending the next three hours decoding a 4-word text.

media:content.media:title: When a text tone changes
media:content.media:description: It’s the slight change in tone for me. Now I’m spending the next three hours decoding a 4-word text.

item.title: When “no wrong answers” isn’t true
item.description: There are no wrong answers, I just want to hear your thoughts.” Then they explain exactly why your thoughts are wrong. Never satisfied.

media:content.media:title: When “no wrong answers” isn’t true
media:content.media:description: There are no wrong answers, I just want to hear your thoughts.” Then they explain exactly why your thoughts are wrong. Never satisfied.

item.title: Trying to Make Plans With an Introvert
item.description: POV: trying to make plans with the resident introvert. A very familiar little struggle for anyone who needs a minute before saying yes.

media:content.media:title: Trying to Make Plans With an Introvert
media:content.media:description: POV: trying to make plans with the resident introvert. A very familiar little struggle for anyone who needs a minute before saying yes.
